description: The line chart falsely implies a continuous trend or relationship between completely unrelated, discrete nationalities (England, Germany, Spain, etc.), as if there is a meaningful progression or transition from one country to the next. The connecting line suggests that values change in a sequential or ordered fashion across categories, which is misleading since the nationalities have no inherent order or continuity. A reader might incorrectly interpret the downward slope as a trend rather than simply reflecting the ranked counts of independent categories.
